questions.question: What is our total revenue?

gold.sql:
SELECT SUM(crm.orders.total) AS revenue
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'

naive.sql: SELECT SUM(total) AS total_revenue FROM crm.orders WHERE status = 'completed' LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT SUM(crm.orders.total) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS gross_revenue
FROM crm.orders
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is our net revenue?

gold.sql:
SELECT (
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(crm.orders.total), 0) FROM crm.orders WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled')
  - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(crm.refunds.amount), 0) FROM crm.refunds)
) AS net_revenue

naive.sql: SELECT SUM(total) FROM crm.orders WHERE status = 'completed' LIMIT 200

semantic.sql: SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.total), 0) FROM crm.orders o WHERE o.status <> 'cancelled') - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) FROM crm.refunds r) AS net_revenue

questions.question: What is our gross revenue?

gold.sql:
SELECT SUM(crm.orders.total) AS gross_revenue
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'

naive.sql: SELECT SUM(total) AS gross_revenue FROM crm.orders WHERE status = 'completed' LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT SUM(crm.orders.total) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS gross_revenue
FROM crm.orders
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is our revenue after refunds?

gold.sql:
SELECT (
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(crm.orders.total), 0) FROM crm.orders WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled')
  - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(crm.refunds.amount), 0) FROM crm.refunds)
) AS revenue_after_refunds

naive.sql: SELECT SUM(total - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(amount) FROM crm.refunds WHERE order_id = crm.orders.id), 0)) AS revenue_after_refunds FROM crm.orders WHERE status = 'completed' LIMIT 200

semantic.sql: SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.total), 0) FROM crm.orders o WHERE o.status <> 'cancelled') - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) FROM crm.refunds r) AS net_revenue

questions.question: What is our subtotal revenue, before tax and shipping?

gold.sql:
SELECT SUM(crm.orders.subtotal) AS subtotal_revenue
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'

naive.sql: SELECT SUM(subtotal) AS total_revenue FROM crm.orders WHERE status = 'completed' LIMIT 1

semantic.sql:
SELECT SUM(crm.orders.subtotal) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS subtotal_revenue
FROM crm.orders
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is our merchandise revenue?

gold.sql:
SELECT SUM(crm.orders.subtotal) AS merchandise_revenue
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'

naive.sql: SELECT SUM(total) AS merchandise_revenue FROM crm.orders WHERE status = 'completed' LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT SUM(crm.orders.subtotal) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS subtotal_revenue
FROM crm.orders
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is our average order value?

gold.sql:
SELECT AVG(crm.orders.total) AS aov
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'

naive.sql: SELECT AVG(total) AS average_order_value FROM crm.orders LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT AVG(crm.orders.total) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS aov
FROM crm.orders
LIMIT 200

questions.question: How many orders have we processed?

gold.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'

naive.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm.orders LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS order_count
FROM crm.orders
LIMIT 200

questions.question: How many transactions do we have?

gold.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS transactions
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'

naive.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm.orders LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS order_count
FROM crm.orders
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is our gross margin?

gold.sql:
SELECT
    (SUM(crm.order_items.line_total) - SUM(crm.order_items.quantity * crm.products.cost))
    / NULLIF(SUM(crm.order_items.line_total), 0) AS gross_margin
  FROM crm.order_items
  JOIN crm.products ON crm.order_items.product_id = crm.products.id

naive.sql: SELECT SUM(p.list_price - p.cost) AS gross_margin FROM crm.products p LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT (SUM(crm.order_items.line_total) - SUM(crm.order_items.quantity * crm.products.cost)) / NULLIF(SUM(crm.order_items.line_total), 0) AS gross_margin
FROM crm.order_items
LEFT JOIN crm.products ON crm.order_items.product_id = crm.products.id
LIMIT 200

questions.question: How many repeat customers do we have?

gold.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS repeat_customers
  FROM (
    SELECT crm.orders.customer_id
      FROM crm.orders
     WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
     GROUP BY crm.orders.customer_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  ) sub

naive.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM crm.orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 LIMIT 200

semantic.sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT customer_id FROM crm.orders WHERE status <> 'cancelled' GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) sub) AS repeat_customers

questions.question: What is the total billed amount across non-cancelled orders?

gold.sql:
SELECT SUM(crm.orders.total) AS billed
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'

naive.sql: SELECT SUM(total) AS total_billed FROM crm.orders WHERE status <> 'cancelled' LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT SUM(crm.orders.total) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS gross_revenue
FROM crm.orders
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is our take-home revenue?

gold.sql:
SELECT (
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(crm.orders.total), 0) FROM crm.orders WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled')
  - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(crm.refunds.amount), 0) FROM crm.refunds)
) AS take_home_revenue

naive.sql: SELECT SUM(total) - SUM(discount) AS take_home_revenue FROM crm.orders WHERE status = 'completed' LIMIT 200

semantic.sql: SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.total), 0) FROM crm.orders o WHERE o.status <> 'cancelled') - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) FROM crm.refunds r) AS net_revenue

questions.question: How many returning customers placed more than one order?

gold.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS returning_customers
  FROM (
    SELECT crm.orders.customer_id
      FROM crm.orders
     WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
     GROUP BY crm.orders.customer_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  ) sub

naive.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM crm.orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(id) > 1 LIMIT 200

semantic.sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT customer_id FROM crm.orders WHERE status <> 'cancelled' GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) sub) AS repeat_customers

questions.question: What are our total sales?

gold.sql:
SELECT SUM(crm.orders.total) AS sales
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'

naive.sql: SELECT SUM(total) AS total_sales FROM crm.orders WHERE status = 'completed' LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT SUM(crm.orders.total) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS gross_revenue
FROM crm.orders
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is our gross revenue by country?

gold.sql:
SELECT crm.customers.country AS country, SUM(crm.orders.total) AS gross_revenue
  FROM crm.customers
  JOIN crm.orders ON crm.orders.customer_id = crm.customers.id
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
 GROUP BY crm.customers.country
 ORDER BY crm.customers.country

naive.sql: SELECT country, SUM(total) AS gross_revenue FROM crm.orders GROUP BY country LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT crm.customers.country AS customer_country, SUM(crm.orders.total) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS gross_revenue
FROM crm.customers
LEFT JOIN crm.orders ON crm.orders.customer_id = crm.customers.id
GROUP BY crm.customers.country
ORDER BY crm.customers.country
LIMIT 200

questions.question: How many orders did we have by status?

gold.sql:
SELECT crm.orders.status AS status, COUNT(*) AS order_count
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
 GROUP BY crm.orders.status
 ORDER BY crm.orders.status

naive.sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM crm.orders GROUP BY status LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT crm.orders.status AS order_status, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS order_count
FROM crm.orders
GROUP BY crm.orders.status
ORDER BY crm.orders.status
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is our gross revenue by customer segment?

gold.sql:
SELECT crm.customers.segment AS segment, SUM(crm.orders.total) AS gross_revenue
  FROM crm.customers
  JOIN crm.orders ON crm.orders.customer_id = crm.customers.id
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
 GROUP BY crm.customers.segment
 ORDER BY crm.customers.segment

naive.sql: SELECT segment, SUM(total) AS gross_revenue FROM crm.orders o JOIN crm.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY segment LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT crm.customers.segment AS customer_segment, SUM(crm.orders.total) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS gross_revenue
FROM crm.customers
LEFT JOIN crm.orders ON crm.orders.customer_id = crm.customers.id
GROUP BY crm.customers.segment
ORDER BY crm.customers.segment
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is the average order value by country?

gold.sql:
SELECT crm.customers.country AS country, AVG(crm.orders.total) AS aov
  FROM crm.customers
  JOIN crm.orders ON crm.orders.customer_id = crm.customers.id
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
 GROUP BY crm.customers.country
 ORDER BY crm.customers.country

naive.sql: SELECT c.country, AVG(o.total) AS average_order_value FROM crm.orders o JOIN crm.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.country LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT crm.customers.country AS customer_country, AVG(crm.orders.total) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS aov
FROM crm.customers
LEFT JOIN crm.orders ON crm.orders.customer_id = crm.customers.id
GROUP BY crm.customers.country
ORDER BY crm.customers.country
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is our gross margin by product category?

gold.sql:
SELECT crm.products.category AS category,
       (SUM(crm.order_items.line_total) - SUM(crm.order_items.quantity * crm.products.cost))
         / NULLIF(SUM(crm.order_items.line_total), 0) AS gross_margin
  FROM crm.order_items
  JOIN crm.products ON crm.order_items.product_id = crm.products.id
 GROUP BY crm.products.category
 ORDER BY crm.products.category

naive.sql:
SELECT p.category, SUM(o.total - o.discount - SUM(oi.line_total)) AS gross_margin
FROM crm.products p
JOIN crm.order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id
JOIN crm.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
GROUP BY p.category
LIMIT 200;
naive.error: exec-failed: aggregate function calls cannot be nested

semantic.sql:
SELECT crm.products.category AS product_category, (SUM(crm.order_items.line_total) - SUM(crm.order_items.quantity * crm.products.cost)) / NULLIF(SUM(crm.order_items.line_total), 0) AS gross_margin
FROM crm.order_items
LEFT JOIN crm.products ON crm.order_items.product_id = crm.products.id
GROUP BY crm.products.category
ORDER BY crm.products.category
LIMIT 200

gold.sql:
SELECT crm.customers.country AS country, SUM(crm.orders.subtotal) AS subtotal_revenue
  FROM crm.customers
  JOIN crm.orders ON crm.orders.customer_id = crm.customers.id
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
 GROUP BY crm.customers.country
 ORDER BY crm.customers.country

naive.sql: SELECT country, SUM(subtotal) AS total_revenue FROM crm.orders GROUP BY country LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT crm.customers.country AS customer_country, SUM(crm.orders.subtotal) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS subtotal_revenue
FROM crm.customers
LEFT JOIN crm.orders ON crm.orders.customer_id = crm.customers.id
GROUP BY crm.customers.country
ORDER BY crm.customers.country
LIMIT 200

gold.sql:

  FROM crm.customers
  JOIN crm.orders ON crm.orders.customer_id = crm.customers.id
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
 GROUP BY crm.customers.country
 ORDER BY crm.customers.country

naive.sql: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM crm.orders o JOIN crm.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY country LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT crm.customers.country AS customer_country, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS order_count
FROM crm.customers
LEFT JOIN crm.orders ON crm.orders.customer_id = crm.customers.id
GROUP BY crm.customers.country

LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is our gross revenue by order status?

gold.sql:
SELECT crm.orders.status AS status,
       SUM(crm.orders.total) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS gross_revenue
  FROM crm.orders
 GROUP BY crm.orders.status
 ORDER BY crm.orders.status

naive.sql: SELECT status, SUM(total) AS gross_revenue FROM crm.orders GROUP BY status LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT crm.orders.status AS order_status, SUM(crm.orders.total) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS gross_revenue
FROM crm.orders
GROUP BY crm.orders.status
ORDER BY crm.orders.status
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is the order count by country and segment?

gold.sql:
SELECT crm.customers.country AS country, crm.customers.segment AS segment, COUNT(*) AS order_count
  FROM crm.customers
  JOIN crm.orders ON crm.orders.customer_id = crm.customers.id
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
 GROUP BY crm.customers.country, crm.customers.segment
 ORDER BY crm.customers.country, crm.customers.segment

naive.sql: SELECT country, segment, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM crm.orders o JOIN crm.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY country, segment LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT crm.customers.country AS customer_country, crm.customers.segment AS customer_segment, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS order_count
FROM crm.customers
LEFT JOIN crm.orders ON crm.orders.customer_id = crm.customers.id
GROUP BY crm.customers.country, crm.customers.segment
ORDER BY crm.customers.country, crm.customers.segment
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is our gross revenue by month?

gold.sql:
SELECT date_trunc('month', crm.orders.created_at) AS period, SUM(crm.orders.total) AS gross_revenue
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
 GROUP BY date_trunc('month', crm.orders.created_at)
 ORDER BY date_trunc('month', crm.orders.created_at)

naive.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.created_at) AS month, SUM(o.total) AS gross_revenue FROM crm.orders o GROUP BY month ORDER BY month LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT date_trunc('month', crm.orders.created_at) AS order_created_at, SUM(crm.orders.total) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS gross_revenue
FROM crm.orders
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', crm.orders.created_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('month', crm.orders.created_at)
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is our gross revenue by quarter?

gold.sql:
SELECT date_trunc('quarter', crm.orders.created_at) AS period, SUM(crm.orders.total) AS gross_revenue
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
 GROUP BY date_trunc('quarter', crm.orders.created_at)
 ORDER BY date_trunc('quarter', crm.orders.created_at)

naive.sql: SELECT date_trunc('quarter', o.created_at) AS quarter, SUM(o.total) AS gross_revenue FROM crm.orders o GROUP BY quarter ORDER BY quarter LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT date_trunc('quarter', crm.orders.created_at) AS order_created_at, SUM(crm.orders.total) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS gross_revenue
FROM crm.orders
GROUP BY date_trunc('quarter', crm.orders.created_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('quarter', crm.orders.created_at)
LIMIT 200

questions.question: How many orders did we have between January and March 2026?

gold.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
   AND crm.orders.created_at >= '2026-01-01'
   AND crm.orders.created_at <  '2026-04-01'

naive.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm.orders WHERE created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01' LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS order_count
FROM crm.orders
WHERE crm.orders.created_at >= $1::timestamptz AND crm.orders.created_at < $2::timestamptz
LIMIT 200

questions.question: How many paid orders do we have?

gold.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS paid_orders
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status = 'paid'

naive.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm.orders WHERE status = 'paid' LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS order_count
FROM crm.orders
WHERE crm.orders.status = $1
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is the order count by year?

gold.sql:
SELECT date_trunc('year', crm.orders.created_at) AS period, COUNT(*) AS order_count
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled'
 GROUP BY date_trunc('year', crm.orders.created_at)
 ORDER BY date_trunc('year', crm.orders.created_at)

naive.sql: SELECT DATE_PART('year', created_at) AS year, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM crm.orders GROUP BY year ORDER BY year LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT date_trunc('year', crm.orders.created_at) AS order_created_at, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS order_count
FROM crm.orders
GROUP BY date_trunc('year', crm.orders.created_at)
ORDER BY date_trunc('year', crm.orders.created_at)
LIMIT 200

questions.question: What is the order count for shipped orders only?

gold.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS shipped_orders
  FROM crm.orders
 WHERE crm.orders.status = 'shipped'

naive.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm.orders WHERE status = 'shipped' LIMIT 200

semantic.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE crm.orders.status <> 'cancelled') AS order_count
FROM crm.orders
WHERE crm.orders.status = $1
LIMIT 200
